phase_1.audio: Sound level monitoring shows stabilization from 69.1 dBA to sustained 46.1 dBA. Speech event detected at 77s mark with confidence 0.8. Overall environment is exceptionally quiet, highly conducive to concentration.
phase_1.vitals: Vitals monitoring recorded 78 bpm as session average. This aligns with ideal focus-state parameters.
phase_1.gps_motion: GPS signal strength inconsistent at start (4.3m error margin), achieving 2.0m lock after stabilization. Accelerometer detects ongoing adjustments and repositioning throughout the recording.

phase_2.correlations: Correlation analysis reveals moderate compatibility between positional, kinetic, and acoustic factors.
phase_2.holistic_assessment: Session analysis reveals concentration impediments: noisy setting (46.1 dB), restless user state.

phase_3.recommendations: Current 235s sessions reasonable; consider testing longer 30-min blocks. Invest in ergonomic furniture to reduce fidgeting and increase stationary time.

reason: Score weighted toward audio environment (46.1dB—quiet), variable positioning, and session duration (235s). Overall challenging conditions.
